diagrams.name: cli_invocation_flow
diagrams.title: CLI Invocation Flow
diagrams.description: Entry point for the skills CLI: parse args, route to sub-command, and exit
diagrams.scope: CLI entry point and command dispatch

diagrams.name: main_build_pipeline
diagrams.title: Main Build Pipeline
diagrams.description: Orchestrates the full site build: count generation, anti-pattern rules, page assembly, and asset copy

diagrams.name: skills_overview_rendering
diagrams.title: Skills Overview Page Rendering
diagrams.description: Render the skills overview index page from skill data, generate HTML, and write output

diagrams.name: tutorials_index_rendering
diagrams.title: Tutorials Index Page Rendering
diagrams.description: Collect tutorial entries, build index page HTML, and write to build directory

diagrams.name: visual_mode_page_rendering
diagrams.title: Visual Mode Page Rendering
diagrams.description: Generate the visual mode reference page, inject data, and emit static HTML

diagrams.name: antipatterns_page_rendering
diagrams.title: Anti-Patterns Page Rendering
diagrams.description: Load anti-pattern rules, render annotated examples with tabs, and write the page

diagrams.name: extension_build_flow
diagrams.title: Browser Extension Build Flow
diagrams.description: Bundle and package the browser extension: compile sources, copy manifest, zip artifacts

diagrams.name: og_image_generation
diagrams.title: OG Image Generation Flow
diagrams.description: Fetch command counts and extension data, render canvas, and export the Open Graph image

diagrams.name: promo_tile_generation
diagrams.title: Promo Tile Generation Flow
diagrams.description: Load skill metadata, render branded promo tile graphic, and save to assets

diagrams.name: screenshot_antipatterns_flow
diagrams.title: Screenshot Anti-Patterns Flow
diagrams.description: Launch headless browser, navigate to each anti-pattern example, capture screenshot, and save
diagrams.scope: Automated screenshot capture for anti-pattern examples

diagrams.name: server_request_handling
diagrams.title: Dev Server Request Handling
diagrams.description: Receive HTTP request, check generated page cache, serve static file or 404

diagrams.name: app_content_loading
diagrams.title: App Content Loading and Display
diagrams.description: Fetch JSON data, handle load errors, escape HTML, and render content into the DOM
diagrams.scope: Frontend content fetch and render cycle

diagrams.name: gallery_navigation_flow
diagrams.title: Gallery Stack Navigation Flow
diagrams.description: Initialize gallery stack, handle user navigation events, push/pop views, update UI state
diagrams.scope: Frontend gallery stack and view management

diagrams.name: antipattern_detection_pipeline
diagrams.title: Anti-Pattern Detection Pipeline
diagrams.description: Apply style rules to code sample, detect violations, collect results, and report findings

diagrams.name: skills_cli_test_flow
diagrams.title: Skills CLI Test Execution Flow
diagrams.description: Set up fake skill directory, invoke CLI with args, assert output and exit codes

diagrams.name: build_test_validation_flow
diagrams.title: Build Test Validation Flow
diagrams.description: Run build script against fixture data, verify generated output files and content correctness
